macro_markets.query: What are the most important macroeconomic and stock market news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major index movements, Fed/central bank news, and significant company earnings or announcements.

crypto_news.query: What are the most significant cryptocurrency and blockchain news from the past 24 hours? Include major price movements, regulatory news, and notable project developments.

items.title: Over $100 Million in Token Unlocks Scheduled This Week Across 10 Projects
items.summary: More than $100 million worth of tokens from projects like Sui ($47.5M on April 1), Definitive ($16.6M on April 2), Ethena, GUNZ, and EigenCloud are set to unlock between March 30 and April 5, potentially impacting prices.

items.title: Bitcoin Slips to $66,000 Amid Options Expiry and Geopolitical Tensions
items.summary: Bitcoin dropped to $66,000 following a $14B options expiry on March 27 and escalation in the Iran war, with $66K support at risk of breaking toward $60K; whale accumulation of 270K BTC noted but overshadowed by macro pressures.

items.title: BNP Paribas Launches Bitcoin and Ether ETNs in France Starting March 30
items.summary: BNP Paribas introduces 6 regulated ETNs indexed to Bitcoin and Ether, accessible via standard securities accounts for retail investors in France from March 30, offering simplified exposure without direct crypto holding.

items.title: Tezos Hosts Tezdev 2026 Conference in Cannes on March 30
items.summary: Tezos ecosystem's fifth annual free developer event Tezdev 2026 kicks off March 30 in Cannes, France, featuring interactive XP Zone, scalability updates, Etherlink L2 growth (TVL up 6,200%), and AI integration.

items.title: Massive Token Unlocks Hit 12 Altcoins This Week Including BSquared, GUNZ, Optimism
items.summary: 12 altcoins face significant unlocks starting March 30, such as BSquared Network ($1.55M, 5.01% of market value) and GUNZ ($1.28M, 4.91%), amid Bitcoin's weekly 3.47% decline to around $66,000.

ai_news.query: What are the most important artificial intelligence and machine learning news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include new model releases, company announcements, research breakthroughs, and industry trends.

items.title: Gartner Predicts 50% of HR Activities AI-Automated by 2030
items.summary: Gartner research reveals 92% of HR leaders have implemented AI in the last six months, with 50% of HR activities expected to be automated or handled by AI agents by 2030. New skills like AI literacy and responsible AI governance are rising in importance for HR professionals.[4]

items.title: AI Reduces Cyberattack Exploit Time from Years to Days
items.summary: Artificial intelligence has drastically shortened the time for cyber attackers to exploit vulnerabilities, transforming operations from years to mere days. This highlights AI's dual role in accelerating both offensive and defensive cybersecurity efforts.[5]

items.title: AI Labs Advance into Application Security with Structural Limits
items.summary: AI labs are expanding into application security, but face three key barriers preventing full disruption, paving the way for next-generation durable defenses. This delineates where AI will and won't transform cybersecurity.[3]

items.title: Schools Urged to Teach AI to Prevent Students Falling Behind
items.summary: Educator Daniel Oppenheimer argues schools must integrate AI education to prepare students for success, emphasizing holistic learning over standardized testing in the AI era. Published March 29, 2026.[2]

items.title: Terraforming the AI Use Case Desert: Building Effective AI Agent Teams
items.summary: Discussion on developing practical AI use cases and building AI agent teams that deliver results, addressing the 'desert' of viable applications. Covers strategies from March 29, 2026.[1]

gaming.query: What are the most notable video game and gaming industry news from the past 24 hours? Include game releases, announcements, esports, and industry developments.

tech_news.query: What are the most important technology news and developments from the past 24 hours? Include major product launches, company news, and significant tech industry developments. Exclude AI-specific news.

items.title: Tech Mahindra and IIT Bombay Sign MoU for 3D Digital Twin Smart Campus
items.summary: Tech Mahindra signed an MoU with IIT Bombay to develop a 3D Digital Twin of the Gymkhana Building in Mumbai for smart campus initiatives.

items.title: India’s First Hydrogen Train Completes Successful Oscillation Trials
items.summary: India’s first hydrogen-powered train has successfully completed oscillation trials, marking a key milestone in green transportation technology.

items.title: DPIIT Signs MoUs with KRAFTON and Repos Energy for Startups
items.summary: India’s DPIIT signed MoUs with KRAFTON and Repos Energy to boost the startup ecosystem in digital entertainment and deep-tech sectors.

items.title: India and EU Sign Aviation Pact
items.summary: India and the EU signed an aviation agreement to enhance manufacturing capabilities and safety standards in the aviation sector.

items.title: APSEZ Operationalizes India’s First Port of Refuge
items.summary: Adani Ports and Special Economic Zone (APSEZ) has operationalized India’s first Port of Refuge to improve maritime safety.
